project.description: An orchestration layer for AI coding assistants (currently Claude Code) that enforces consistency, reliability, and more predictable outputs through development standards, automation tools, and AI-assisted workflows organized as 7 production bundles with 95 components.
project.description_reasoning: source: README.adoc introduction + CLAUDE.md repository overview

default.responsibility: Root Python project providing the pyprojectx-based build system (mypy, ruff, pytest) for all marketplace bundle scripts and their tests. Contains no application code itself — sources are the bundle scripts under marketplace/bundles/.
default.responsibility_reasoning: pyproject.toml with pyprojectx aliases, sources=[marketplace/bundles], tests=[test]
default.purpose_reasoning: Build-time tooling only, no runtime application

marketplace.bundles.description: All marketplace bundle source code — Python scripts for build operations, architecture management, workflow orchestration, and domain-specific tooling

test.description: Pytest test suites organized by bundle, covering script behavior, extension APIs, and integration tests

default.skills_by_profile_reasoning: general-dev: cross-cutting code quality for Python project; python: build_systems=python

documentation.responsibility: Project-level AsciiDoc documentation including architecture guides, build structure docs, and user-facing README. Contains no code — purely documentation artifacts.

doc.description: Project-level AsciiDoc documentation including architecture guides and build structure documentation

plan-marshall.responsibility: Core infrastructure bundle providing environment setup, permission management, extension API for domain bundle discovery, build system abstraction (Maven/Gradle/npm/Python), cross-cutting general-dev skills, and the complete 7-phase development workflow from task planning to PR finalization.
plan-marshall.responsibility_reasoning: README.md: foundational infrastructure — config, permissions, extension API, utilities, workflow
plan-marshall.purpose_reasoning: marshall-plugin bundle providing skills, agents, and workflow orchestration

skills.plan-marshall-plugin.description: Extension API providing build system discovery (Maven/Gradle/npm/Python) and general-dev cross-cutting domain with content-aware applicability

skills.manage-architecture.description: Project architecture discovery, enrichment, and querying with two-layer persistence (derived-data + llm-enriched)

skills.phase-5-execute.description: Task execution engine with two-tier skill loading, domain-specific task executors, and verification sub-loop

pm-dev-frontend.responsibility: Frontend development standards for modern JavaScript (ES modules, async patterns), CSS, web components, project structure, and build tooling (ESLint, Prettier, StyleLint, Jest, Cypress). Includes triage extension for JavaScript findings.
pm-dev-frontend.responsibility_reasoning: README.md: comprehensive frontend expertise with skills and build integration
pm-dev-frontend.purpose_reasoning: marshall-plugin bundle with JavaScript/CSS domain skills

skills.cui-javascript.description: Core JavaScript development standards for ES modules, modern patterns, async programming, and code quality

skills.plan-marshall-plugin.description: JavaScript domain extension with npm build system detection and signal-based profile applicability

pm-dev-java.responsibility: Comprehensive Java development expertise providing standards for core patterns, null safety, Lombok, CDI/Quarkus, JUnit 5 testing, JavaDoc, and logging. Includes verification agents for coverage analysis and compliance checking.
pm-dev-java.responsibility_reasoning: README.md: Java development knowledge base with skills and verification agents
pm-dev-java.purpose_reasoning: marshall-plugin bundle with Java domain skills

skills.java-core.description: Core Java development patterns, modern features, and performance optimization standards

skills.junit-core.description: JUnit 5 testing patterns with AAA structure, test organization, and coverage standards

skills.plan-marshall-plugin.description: Java domain extension with signal-based profile detection (IT, CDI, Lombok) and three-layer profile filtering

pm-dev-java-cui.responsibility: CUI-specific Java standards complementing pm-dev-java with opinionated patterns for CuiLogger/LogRecord, test data generators, value object contracts, and HTTP client testing via MockWebServer.
pm-dev-java-cui.responsibility_reasoning: README.md: CUI library-specific standards, additive to general Java standards
pm-dev-java-cui.purpose_reasoning: marshall-plugin bundle with CUI Java domain skills, additive_to=java

skills.cui-logging.description: CuiLogger and LogRecord standards for structured logging in CUI projects

skills.cui-testing.description: CUI test library standards for test data generation, value object contracts, and JUL log testing

pm-dev-oci.responsibility: OCI container standards covering image building (minimal bases, multi-stage, pinned versions), multi-platform builds, distroless health probes, runtime hardening, vulnerability scanning, supply chain security, and OWASP container controls.

pm-dev-oci.purpose_reasoning: marshall-plugin bundle with OCI container domain skills

skills.oci-standards.description: General OCI container practices for image building, multi-platform builds, and distroless health probes

skills.oci-security.description: OCI container security covering runtime hardening, supply chain security, and OWASP controls

pm-dev-python.purpose_reasoning: marshall-plugin bundle with Python domain skills

pm-dev-python.skills_by_profile_reasoning: plan-marshall-plugin-dev: build_systems=marshall-plugin; python: Python scripts in skills and tests

pm-documents.responsibility: Documentation domain standards for AsciiDoc, Architectural Decision Records (ADRs), and interface specifications. Provides validation, formatting, and maintenance workflows with documentation-specific triage extension.

pm-documents.purpose_reasoning: marshall-plugin bundle with documentation domain skills

pm-plugin-development.responsibility: Complete toolchain for marketplace plugin lifecycle — creation wizards, quality diagnosis (plugin-doctor), maintenance, inventory scanning, and architecture guidance. Organized by user goals: CREATE, DOCTOR, MAINTAIN, VERIFY.
pm-plugin-development.responsibility_reasoning: README.md: goal-based toolchain for plugin development lifecycle
pm-plugin-development.purpose_reasoning: marshall-plugin bundle providing plugin development tooling

skills.plugin-architecture.description: Architecture principles, skill patterns, and design guidance for building marketplace components
